# game Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-02-13

## Active Technologies
- JavaScript ES2022+, React 19.2, Vite 7.3 + React 19, Vite 7, Zustand 5 (state management) — no additions (002-ui-redesign-german)
- N/A (in-memory session state only; constitution prohibits persistence) (002-ui-redesign-german)

- JavaScript ES6+ (React 19, no TypeScript per constitution) + React 19.2.0, Vite 7.3.1, Zustand (latest), Web Speech API (browser native) (001-spiral-quiz-game)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

JavaScript ES6+ (React 19, no TypeScript per constitution): Follow standard conventions
